site.description: Browse matches, groups, venues and national teams for the 2026 World Cup.
footer.createdWith: Data from OpenFootball and a lightweight Astro design.
home.metaTitle: World Cup 2026: matches, groups and teams
home.metaDescription: Browse the 2026 World Cup calendar, groups, national teams, venues and knockout fixtures on a fast, clear page.
home.title: World Cup 2026: matches, groups and teams
home.description: A lightweight page to quickly browse the calendar, teams by group, venues and knockout fixtures for the 2026 World Cup.
home.dataDescription: The page uses the public JSON from the openfootball/worldcup.json project and keeps a minimal fallback copy to make deployment stable.
home.matchesDescription: Check the date, user local time, result, round, group and venue for the first tournament fixtures.
home.teamsDescription: Explore the teams in each group and the number of scheduled matches in the opening stage.
home.detailsTitle: Quick information to follow the tournament
home.detailsDescription: The structure separates group stage and knockout rounds so it can later grow with filters, search or pages by team.
home.knockoutDescription: scheduled matches from the round of 32 to the final.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist, has moved or has not been created yet.
